summary: Iteration 50: Complete testing of Task Compliance Dashboard feature. Backend: 10/10 tests passed - GET /api/task-reminders/compliance endpoint with different period parameters (7/14/30/60 days) returns all expected data structures (overview, role_compliance, employee_leaderboard, heatmap, trend, flagged_employees). Frontend: TaskCompliancePage fully functional with all UI components verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good. The compliance endpoint performs complex calculations efficiently with proper data aggregation for role compliance, employee leaderboard, heatmap, and trend data.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing reminder data (16 active reminders, 8 alerts sent, 5 acknowledgements)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Task Compliance Dashboard feature fully tested. Backend API GET /api/task-reminders/compliance?days=N returns: overview (compliance %, alerts sent, acknowledged, active reminders, best role, tracked, flagged count, period days), role_compliance array (role, alerts_sent, acknowledged, compliance %), employee_leaderboard array (top 30 employees with id, name, role, alerts_received, acknowledged, compliance %, status), heatmap array (day_num 0-6, hour 0-23, count), trend array (one entry per day with date, alerts_sent, acknowledged, compliance %), flagged_employees array (employees <50% compliance). Frontend: TaskCompliancePage at /task-compliance shows all these as overview cards, progress bars, ranked list, LineChart, heatmap grid, and flagged employees section. Sidebar has 'Task Reminders' and 'Compliance' links under Admin. TaskRemindersPage has 'Compliance' button that navigates to /task-compliance.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/task-reminders/compliance?days=: PASS - Returns overview, role_compliance, employee_leaderboard, heatmap, trend, flagged_employees

data_structures_verified.overview: overall_compliance, total_alerts_sent, total_acknowledgements, active_reminders, best_role, employees_tracked, flagged_count, period_days
data_structures_verified.employee_leaderboard: employee_id, name, role, alerts_received, acknowledged, compliance, status (excellent/good/needs_attention/critical)
data_structures_verified.flagged_employees: Same as leaderboard, filtered to <50% compliance

frontend_task_compliance_page.employee_leaderboard_section: PASS - Shows ranked employees (Unknown #1 100% excellent, Ahmed Khan #2 0% critical)
frontend_task_compliance_page.compliance_trend_chart: PASS - 30-day LineChart with Acknowledged, Alerts Sent, Compliance % lines
frontend_task_compliance_page.acknowledgement_heatmap: PASS - Day x Hour grid showing 5 acks on Sunday
frontend_task_compliance_page.needs_attention_section: PASS - Shows Ahmed Khan 0% below threshold with recommended actions
